detail.application_fee: General / OBC/ EWS : 295/- SC / ST : 0/- All Category Female : 0/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking Only. Indian Navy Civilian INCET 01/2024 Notification :
detail.eligibility: 01/2024 Multi Tasking Staff MTS 16 Class 10th Matric in Any Recognized Board in India OR ITI Certificate Fireman 444 10+2 Intermediate Exam with Elementary / Basic / Auxiliary Fire Fighting Course. Tradesman Mate 161 Class 10th with ITI Certificate in Related Trade. Pest Control Worker 18 Class 10th Exam from Any Recognized Board in India. Knowledge of Hindi / Regional Languages Fire Engine Driver 58 10+2 Intermediate with HMV Driving License. Cook 09 Class 10th with 1 year Experience in Related Trade. Chargeman (Ammunition Workshop) 01 Bachelor Degree in Science B.SC with Physics / Chemistry / Mathematics OR Diploma in Chemical Engineering. Chargeman (Factory) 10 Bachelor Degree in Science B.SC with Physics / Chemistry / Mathematics OR Diploma in Electrical / Electronics / Mechanical / Computer Engineering. Chargeman (Mechanic) 18 Diploma in Mechanical / Electrical / Electronics / Production Engineering with 2 Year Experience. Scientific Assistant 04 Bachelor Degree in Science B.SC in Physics / Chemistry / Electronics / Oceanography with 2 Year Experience. More Eligibility Read the Notification. Draughtsman (Construction) 02 Class 10th Exam with 2 year Certificate in Draughtsmanship OR 3 year Apprenticeship Under Training Scheme OR ITI Certificate. More Eligibility Read the Notification. How to Fill Indian Navy INCET 01/2024 Online Form 2024 Join Indian Navy Are Released for Indian Navy Civilian Entrance Test INCET 01/2024 Recruitment Of Chargeman, Fireman, Driver, Tradesman and Other Various Post 2024. Candidate Can Apply Between 20/07/2024 to 02/08/2024. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in Indian Navy Civilian Entrance Test INCET 01/2024 Recruitment Of Chargeman and Other Post Exam Recruitment 2024..
